Headline: #43 43rd Temporary Westbound Reroute near 43rd/Michigan
ShortDescription: Westbound #43 43rd buses are temporarily rerouted via 43rd, Indiana, 39th, State, 43rd and over regular route, due to street blockage near 43rd/Michigan.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #43 43rd buses are temporarily rerouted via 43rd, Indiana, 39th, State, 43rd and over regular route, due to street blockage near 43rd/Michigan.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Howard-bound Red Line Service Delayed at 87th
ShortDescription: Howard-bound Red Line trains are standing at 87th due to a sick customer. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Howard-bound Red Line trains are standing at 87th due to a sick customer.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
